timing_policy.method: Generate one natural Brazilian Portuguese utterance per segment, place it at the segment start, and preserve silence between segments.
fit_order: Tighten the Brazilian Portuguese wording without changing meaning.
Regenerate with pronunciation or punctuation adjustments.
Apply no more than 10 percent time compression when editorial changes cannot solve the overrun.
do_not: Synthesize each original VTT cue as a separate utterance.
Move narration across a visual transition without reviewing the picture.
Map the original English audio stream into the localized video.

audio_mix.method: The source audio stream will not be mapped. The aligned Brazilian Portuguese voice-only master will be mixed over viacheslavstarostin-educational-learning-study-music-473828.mp3, normalized to -27 LUFS. Music fades in, sidechain-ducks beneath narration, restores between phrases, and fades over the final four seconds.
audio_mix.review_warning: Confirm narration level, pronunciation, music balance, ducking transitions, and the final fade.

editorial_notes: Corrected clear AI-caption recognition errors before Brazilian Portuguese translation.
Preserved official OCP product, program, and organization names in English where required.

segments.english: We have covered the history and the community. Now let us get hands-on.
segments.portuguese: Cobrimos a história e a comunidade. Agora vamos colocar a mão na massa.

segments.english: This is Open Rack version 3, or ORv3. It is the physical foundation of the modern AI-driven data center.
segments.portuguese: Este é Open Rack versão 3 ou ORv3. É a base física do moderno data center baseado em IA.

segments.english: To understand why it is built this way, you must understand the architecture of power.
segments.portuguese: Para entender por que ele foi construído assim, é preciso compreender a arquitetura da alimentação elétrica.

segments.english: In a traditional 19-inch rack, every server had its own power supply, plugged into a large power strip known as a PDU.
segments.portuguese: Em racks tradicionais de 19 polegadas, cada servidor tinha uma fonte ligada a uma grande régua de distribuição, ou PDU.

segments.english: Early Open Rack designs solved this cable mess by replacing the power strips with a centralized 12-volt bus bar built into the frame.
segments.portuguese: Os primeiros Open Rack eliminaram a confusão de cabos ao trocar as réguas por um barramento central de 12 volts na estrutura.

segments.english: That worked for standard cloud servers drawing 10 to 15 kilowatts. But today's AI clusters demand 100 kilowatts or more per rack.
segments.portuguese: Isso bastava para servidores em nuvem de 10 a 15 quilowatts. Mas clusters de IA exigem 100 quilowatts ou mais por rack.

segments.english: If you push that much power at 12 volts, the current rises dramatically. This goes far beyond simple power loss.
segments.portuguese: Se você aumentar tanta potência em 12 volts, a corrente aumentará dramaticamente. Isso vai muito além da simples perda de energia.

segments.english: Sending that much current through a 12-volt bus bar would be catastrophic. It could melt the copper, throw sparks, and cause total system failure.
segments.portuguese: Em 12 volts, a corrente derreteria o cobre e causaria falhas.

segments.english: So the Rack & Power Project changed the standard. ORv3 uses a 48-volt DC bus bar.
segments.portuguese: Então o Projeto Rack & Power mudou o padrão. ORv3 usa um barramento CC de 48 volts.

segments.english: By increasing the voltage, we reduce heat loss by a factor of 16. More power reaches the silicon instead of burning up in the infrastructure.
segments.portuguese: Ao aumentar a tensão, reduzimos a perda de calor por um fator de 16. Mais energia chega ao silício em vez de queimar na infraestrutura.

segments.english: We also completely reimagined power delivery.
segments.portuguese: Também reinventamos completamente o fornecimento de energia.

segments.english: In a traditional setup, every server has its own redundant power supply, usually operating at a low and inefficient utilization rate.
segments.portuguese: Em uma configuração tradicional, cada servidor tem sua própria fonte de alimentação redundante, geralmente operando com utilização baixa e ineficiente.

segments.english: ORv3 pools that workload. It replaces dozens of individual power supplies with one centralized power shelf loaded with modular rectifiers.
segments.portuguese: ORv3 agrupa essa carga de trabalho. Ele substitui dezenas de fontes de alimentação individuais por uma prateleira de energia centralizada carregada com retificadores modulares.

segments.english: By consolidating AC-to-DC conversion for the entire rack, we increase utilization and reduce power loss.
segments.portuguese: Ao consolidar a conversão CA para CC para todo o rack, aumentamos a utilização e reduzimos a perda de energia.

segments.english: This centralized approach simplifies deployment. IT gear slides in and connects to the power spine without manual wiring, and no thick power cords block exhaust airflow.
segments.portuguese: Essa abordagem centralizada simplifica a implantação. O equipamento de TI desliza e se conecta à coluna de alimentação sem fiação manual, e nenhum cabo de alimentação grosso bloqueia o fluxo de ar de exaustão.

segments.english: Eliminating server power supplies frees motherboard space, enabling denser compute and better system airflow.
segments.portuguese: Sem fontes nos servidores, sobra espaço na placa-mãe para mais computação e melhor fluxo de ar.

segments.english: Delivering that much power creates two more challenges: extreme weight and extreme heat. The ORv3 frame is reinforced for the massive weight of modern GPU chassis.
segments.portuguese: Fornecer tanta potência cria mais dois desafios: peso extremo e calor extremo. A estrutura ORv3 é reforçada para suportar o enorme peso dos modernos chassis de GPU.

segments.english: More importantly, the ORv3 frame prepares the data center for the next generation of heat. Liquid-cooling manifolds integrate directly into the rack architecture. ORv3 introduces the Open Compute Universal Quick Disconnect standard, or UQD.
segments.portuguese: Mais importante ainda, a estrutura ORv3 prepara o data center para a próxima geração de calor. Os coletores de refrigeração líquida integram-se diretamente na arquitetura do rack. ORv3 apresenta o padrão Open Compute Universal Quick Disconnect, ou UQD.

segments.english: Server gear slides directly into the rack and connects its liquid-cooling circuits safely, seamlessly, and without drips.
segments.portuguese: O servidor desliza no rack e conecta a refrigeração líquida com segurança, sem gotejamento.

segments.english: We solved the power-delivery bottleneck, but extracting the heat is a different challenge. Let us see how these racks avoid melting down.
segments.portuguese: Resolvemos o gargalo do fornecimento de energia, mas retirar o calor é outro desafio. Vamos ver como esses racks evitam o superaquecimento.

language_policy.dialect: Natural Brazilian Portuguese for a professional technical audience.
language_policy.acronyms: Use IA in spoken Portuguese; retain OCP and product acronyms where technically appropriate.
language_policy.numbers: Preserve every source year, percentage, voltage, and monetary value exactly.
language_policy.tone: Warm, authoritative, concise, and natural for spoken Brazilian Portuguese.
